changeReasons.description: Runtime private evidence and MTTR correlation is positive but based on a small bounded window.
nonConclusions: small-sample correlation cannot strengthen a formal claim

refreshDecision.decisionReason: Narrow H5 to exploratory runtime exposure monitoring until more incident windows are available.

refresh decision does not discharge theorem preconditions

retainedHypotheses.rationale: No contradictory operational signal was observed in this cycle.
nonConclusions: retained does not mean proved

rejectedHypotheses.rationale: Causal phrasing is rejected because the monitor records correlation with explicit confounders.
nonConclusions: rejecting causal phrasing does not reject exploratory monitoring

proposedUpdates.changeSummary: Track runtime exposure as an exploratory correlation with incident scope and MTTR, not as a causal claim.
nonConclusions: proposed update is not formal claim promotion
